# Jeza Mancenido

> Startup growth & go-to-market lead bringing emerging AI products to market. Based across LA, SF, and NYC.

## Background
Previously built new platform businesses at Google and worked inside Meta AI as its research operations scaled. Now works with early-stage AI and consumer technology startups on 0→1 GTM.

## Pages
- [About](https://www.jezamancenido.com/): Background, current work in AI go-to-market, and contact links.
- [Opinions](https://www.jezamancenido.com/opinions): Ideas Jeza is testing, arguing for, and building around right now.
- [Links](https://www.jezamancenido.com/links): Contact links (LinkedIn, X, email) and advisory availability.
